english_first.policy: Deterministic per-block pre-board builds a wider source-language ranking board; DeepSeek scores that board; only then the final Russian writing board is cut. Source-language fact cards are service data only, and visible Russian is written directly from facts/evidence.

repair_policy: hard_defects_only; soft short/style issues are left for writer recovery and whole-digest final editor

batching_strategy.short_card_target_batch: 6-8 items when token budget allows; heavy items split automatically.

concurrency_policy.policy: Do not raise concurrency until token reservation p95 tightening is stable with truncated_responses=0.

batch_api_policy.reason: Batch API is suited to overnight non-urgent work; the 08:00 digest requires online completion.

repair_rejections.title: There's an election coming up which impacts everyone in Greater Manchester more than any other
quality_errors: draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 3.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • Выборы мэра Greater Manchester состоятся 30 июля 2026 года, что повлияет на более чем 3 миллиона жителей региона. Кандидаты уже начали предвыборную кампанию.

repair_rejections.title: Boy, 16, suspected of murdering woman in her 60s remains in custody as police give update
quality_errors: draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 60.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • 16-летний мальчик остается под стражей по подозрению в убийстве женщины в возрасте 60 лет, найденной мертвой на улице Ivylea в Burnage 8 июля. Женщина была названа Энн Тиг и была объявлена мертвой на месте происшествия.

repair_rejections.title: HGV driver seriously injured in crash at M61 roundabout
quality_errors: draft_line for long-format category needs ≥2 sentences (got 1).
